mapper.select: SELECT z.uis_code, z.max_concurrent, z.created_at, z.updated_at, i.UIS_NAME AS uis_name FROM TBL_ZONE_CONFIG z LEFT JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER i ON z.uis_code = i.UIS_CODE WHERE z.uis_code = #{uisCode}
SELECT uis_code, max_concurrent, created_at, updated_at FROM TBL_ZONE_CONFIG WHERE uis_code = #{uisCode} FOR UPDATE
SELECT z.uis_code, z.max_concurrent, z.created_at, z.updated_at, i.UIS_NAME AS uis_name FROM TBL_ZONE_CONFIG z LEFT JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER i ON z.uis_code = i.UIS_CODE ORDER BY z.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ZONE_CONFIG (uis_code, max_concurrent, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{uisCode}, #{maxConcurrent}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_ZONE_CONFIG SET max_concurrent = #{maxConcurrent}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE uis_code = #{uisCode}
